option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import sys from pathlib import Path sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent.parent))
import pytest from src.agents.vision_agent import run_vision_agent from src.agents.matcher_agent import run_matcher_agent from src.agents.reply_agent import run_reply_agent from src.agents.orchestrator import run_pipeline
# ── Shared sample extracted bill ────────────────────────────────────────────── SAMPLE_EXTRACTED = { "extracted_id": "test-001", "ocr_confidence": 0.95, "bill_number": {"value": "B-2026-0001", "confidence": 0.99}, "account_number": {"value": "123456789", "normalized": "123456789", "confidence": 0.98}, "customer_name": {"value": "John Doe", "normalized": "john doe", "confidence": 0.95}, "customer_address": ["1 Main St", "Athens"], "bill_date": {"value": "2026-01-15", "confidence": 0.98}, "service_period": {"start": "2026-01-01", "end": "2026-01-31", "confidence": 0.97}, "total_due": {"value": 152.34, "currency": "EUR", "confidence": 0.97}, "line_items": [ {"description": "energy consumption", "quantity_kwh": 420, "unit_price": 0.12, "amount": 50.4}, {"description": "regulated charges", "quantity_kwh": None, "unit_price": None, "amount": 30.0}, {"description": "taxes", "quantity_kwh": None, "unit_price": None, "amount": 71.94}, ], "meter_ids": ["MTR-987"], "tariff_code": "T01", "match_hints": {"account_hash": "123456789", "name_norm": "john doe", "meter_list": ["MTR-987"]}, }
# ── Agent 1 tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def test_vision_agent_with_text_file(tmp_path): """VisionAgent falls back to rule-based when file is not a real image.""" bill_txt = tmp_path / "bill.txt" bill_txt.write_text( "Account No: 123456789\nTotal Due: EUR 152.34\nMeter: MTR-987\n" "Period From: 01/01/2026 To: 31/01/2026\n" "Energy consumption 420 kWh 0.12 50.40\n" ) result = run_vision_agent(bill_txt) assert result.agent_name == "VisionAgent" assert result.extracted.get("account_number", {}).get("normalized") == "123456789"
# ── Agent 2 tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def test_matcher_agent_exact_match(): result = run_matcher_agent(SAMPLE_EXTRACTED) assert result.match_type == "exact" assert result.matched_customer_id == "cust-42" assert result.score >= 0.95 assert result.agent_name == "MatcherAgent"
def test_matcher_agent_enriches_customer_context(): result = run_matcher_agent(SAMPLE_EXTRACTED) assert "customer_name" in result.customer_context assert result.customer_context["customer_name"] == "John Doe"
def test_matcher_agent_enriches_billing_history(): result = run_matcher_agent(SAMPLE_EXTRACTED) assert isinstance(result.billing_history, list) assert len(result.billing_history) >= 1
def test_matcher_agent_no_match(): no_match = {**SAMPLE_EXTRACTED, "account_number": {"value": "000", "normalized": "000"}, "meter_ids": []} result = run_matcher_agent(no_match) assert result.match_type == "none" assert result.matched_customer_id is None
# ── Agent 3 tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def test_reply_agent_returns_answer(): from dataclasses import asdict matcher = run_matcher_agent(SAMPLE_EXTRACTED) result = run_reply_agent( question="Why is my January bill higher?", vision_result=SAMPLE_EXTRACTED, matcher_result=asdict(matcher), ) assert result.agent_name == "ReplyAgent" assert isinstance(result.answer_text, str) and len(result.answer_text) > 20 assert isinstance(result.confidence_label, str) assert 0.0 <= result.confidence_score <= 1.0 assert isinstance(result.retrieved_passages, list)
def test_reply_agent_retrieves_passages(): from dataclasses import asdict matcher = run_matcher_agent(SAMPLE_EXTRACTED) result = run_reply_agent( question="What are regulated charges?", vision_result=SAMPLE_EXTRACTED, matcher_result=asdict(matcher), ) assert len(result.retrieved_passages) > 0
# ── Orchestrator end-to-end test ──────────────────────────────────────────────
def test_orchestrator_pipeline(tmp_path): bill_txt = tmp_path / "bill.txt" bill_txt.write_text( "Account No: 123456789\nTotal Due: EUR 152.34\nMeter: MTR-987\n" "Period From: 01/01/2026 To: 31/01/2026\n" "Energy consumption 420 kWh 0.12 50.40\n" ) result = run_pipeline(image_path=bill_txt, question="Why is my bill higher?") assert "answer" in result assert "agent1_vision" in result assert "agent2_matcher" in result assert result["agent2_matcher"]["match_type"] == "exact"
